title: Remove yellow borders from PDF header and increase PDF text size

requirements.summary: Remove yellow border or yellow-colored rectangle/line from the PDF header section
acceptanceCriteria: The generated PDF header contains no yellow borders, outlines, or yellow-colored strokes/rectangles.
The rest of the PDF layout and content remains intact.

file_operations.description: Remove any yellow-colored drawing commands (setDrawColor, setFillColor with yellow RGB/hex values, rect calls with yellow stroke/fill) that render borders, rectangles, or lines in the header section of the PDF. Locate the header rendering logic and eliminate yellow color specifications while preserving other header elements (text, logo, layout structure).

requirements.summary: Increase font size for all text elements throughout the PDF document
acceptanceCriteria: All text elements in the generated PDF are rendered at a larger font size than before.
The relative hierarchy between headings, labels, and body text is preserved.
No text overflows or is clipped due to the size increase.

file_operations.description: Increase all setFontSize() calls throughout the PDF generation logic. Apply consistent scaling (e.g., +2 to +4 points) to headers, field labels, field values, section titles, and footer text while maintaining the existing hierarchy (headers larger than body text). Verify text fits within page margins and does not cause line breaks or clipping issues after the increase.
